interfaces.name: getHomePageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the homepage, including author summary, featured books, featured blog posts, and upcoming events.

interfaces.name: getBookFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Books & Search page, including genres, formats, work types, rating options, price ranges, page count ranges, publication date ranges, and sort options.

earliest.description: ISO date string for earliest publication_date

latest.description: ISO date string for latest publication_date

interfaces.name: searchBooks
interfaces.description: Search and browse books with optional keyword and structured filters, used for the Books & Search page and global search results.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text search query, e.g., 'mystery'

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort mode, e.g., 'relevance', 'publication_date_desc', 'price_asc', 'rating_desc'

interfaces.name: getBookDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a single book, including descriptive fields, pricing, rating summary, and related books.

parameters.name: bookId
parameters.description: ID of the book to retrieve (typically from page URL or selection).

interfaces.name: getBookReviews
interfaces.description: Get paginated reviews for a given book for display on the Book Detail page.

parameters.name: bookId
parameters.description: ID of the book whose reviews are requested.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: e.g., 'newest_first', 'oldest_first', 'highest_rating', 'lowest_rating'

interfaces.name: submitBookReview
interfaces.description: Submit a new review for a book, including star rating and text, and return the created review.

parameters.name: bookId
parameters.description: ID of the book being reviewed.

parameters.name: rating
parameters.description: Star rating from 1 to 5 (e.g., 4).

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Text body of the review.

interfaces.name: addBookToCart
interfaces.description: Add a single book to the shopping cart. Creates the cart if it does not exist.

parameters.name: bookId
parameters.description: ID of the book to add to cart.

interfaces.name: addBookToBundle
interfaces.description: Add an eBook to the current active bundle, creating the bundle if needed. Used from book listings and detail pages.

parameters.name: bookId
parameters.description: ID of the eBook to add to the bundle.

interfaces.name: getActiveBundleDetails
interfaces.description: Get details of the current active eBook bundle, including books, quantities, and pricing, for the Bundle Summary page.

interfaces.name: updateBundleItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity for a specific item in the active bundle.

parameters.name: bundleItemId
parameters.description: ID of the BundleItem to update.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: New quantity value.

interfaces.name: removeBundleItem
interfaces.description: Remove a specific item from the active bundle.

parameters.name: bundleItemId
parameters.description: ID of the BundleItem to remove.

interfaces.name: addBundleToCart
interfaces.description: Add the current bundle as a single item to the shopping cart, creating the cart if it does not exist.

parameters.name: bundleId
parameters.description: ID of the bundle to add to the cart.

interfaces.name: getCartDetails
interfaces.description: Get the current cart contents for the Cart page, including books, bundles, quantities, and price totals.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a specific cart item and recalculate cart totals.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: ID of the CartItem to update.

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: New quantity value.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a specific item from the cart and return updated totals.

parameters.name: cartItemId
parameters.description: ID of the CartItem to remove.

interfaces.name: startCheckoutFromCart
interfaces.description: Prepare the cart for checkout and return a confirmation that the user can proceed to an external or separate checkout flow.

message.description: User-facing guidance, e.g., 'Proceed to checkout to complete your purchase.'

interfaces.name: addBookToCompareSet
interfaces.description: Add a book to the current compare set, creating the compare set if it does not exist. Used from book listings.

parameters.name: bookId
parameters.description: ID of the book to add to the compare set.

interfaces.name: getActiveCompareSetDetails
interfaces.description: Get details for the active compare set, including full book data for side-by-side comparison on the Compare Books page.

interfaces.name: removeBookFromCompareSet
interfaces.description: Remove a book from the active compare set.

parameters.name: compareSetItemId
parameters.description: ID of the CompareSetItem to remove.

interfaces.name: clearCompareSet
interfaces.description: Clear all books from the active compare set.

interfaces.name: getLibraryLists
interfaces.description: Get all library lists, optionally filtered by list_type, for use in selection dialogs when saving books or articles.

parameters.name: list_type
parameters.description: Optional filter for list type, e.g., 'book_reading_list', 'book_wishlist', 'article_reading_list', 'favorites'.

interfaces.name: createLibraryList
interfaces.description: Create a new library list, such as a wishlist named 'Summer 2025' or an article reading list.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: User-visible name of the list, e.g., 'Summer 2025'.

parameters.name: list_type
parameters.description: List type, e.g., 'book_reading_list', 'book_wishlist', 'article_reading_list', 'favorites'.

interfaces.name: addBookToLibraryList
interfaces.description: Add a specific book to a selected library list, such as a reading list or wishlist.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: Target library list ID.

parameters.name: bookId
parameters.description: ID of the book to add.

interfaces.name: addBookToFavorites
interfaces.description: Convenience action to add a book to the default favorites list, creating the favorites list if necessary.

parameters.name: bookId
parameters.description: ID of the book to favorite.

interfaces.name: addArticleToLibraryList
interfaces.description: Add a blog article to a selected article reading list, such as 'Articles to Read'.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: Target library list ID for saving the article.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the BlogPost to add.

interfaces.name: getLibraryOverview
interfaces.description: Get an overview of all library lists for the Library page, including list metadata and item counts.

interfaces.name: getLibraryListItems
interfaces.description: Get the items for a specific library list, including referenced books or articles, for display within the Library page.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: ID of the library list whose items should be retrieved.

interfaces.name: renameLibraryList
interfaces.description: Rename an existing library list.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: ID of the library list to rename.

parameters.name: newName
parameters.description: New user-visible name for the list.

interfaces.name: deleteLibraryList
interfaces.description: Delete a library list and all its items. Typically disallowed for default lists but allowed for user-created lists.

parameters.name: listId
parameters.description: ID of the library list to delete.

interfaces.name: removeItemFromLibraryList
interfaces.description: Remove a single item (book or article) from a library list.

parameters.name: libraryListItemId
parameters.description: ID of the LibraryListItem to remove.

interfaces.name: moveLibraryListItem
interfaces.description: Move an item from one library list to another (e.g., from a wishlist to the main reading list).

parameters.name: libraryListItemId
parameters.description: ID of the item to move.

parameters.name: targetListId
parameters.description: ID of the library list to move the item into.

interfaces.name: getEventFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Events page, including event types, months, years, and sort options.

interfaces.name: listEvents
interfaces.description: List events for the Events page with optional filters for month, year, date range, event type, and sort order.

date_from.description: Start date (inclusive) as ISO date string.

date_to.description: End date (inclusive) as ISO date string.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: e.g., 'start_datetime_asc', 'start_datetime_desc'

interfaces.name: getEventDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific event, used on the Event Detail page.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: ID of the event to retrieve.

interfaces.name: registerForEvent
interfaces.description: Submit a registration for a specific event, including attendee details and optional notes.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: ID of the event to register for.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Attendee full name.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Attendee email address.

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Optional notes or questions, e.g., 'Ask about sequel'.

interfaces.name: getBlogFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Blog page, including available tags and sort modes.

interfaces.name: listBlogPosts
interfaces.description: List blog posts for the Blog page with optional tag filter and sort order.

tag.description: Tag slug to filter by, e.g., 'writing_process'.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: e.g., 'published_at_desc', 'published_at_asc', 'comment_count_desc'

interfaces.name: getArticleDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a single blog article, used on the Article Detail page.

parameters.name: articleId
parameters.description: ID of the BlogPost to retrieve.

interfaces.name: listCommentsForPost
interfaces.description: List comments for a blog post for display on the Article Detail page.

parameters.name: postId
parameters.description: ID of the BlogPost whose comments to load.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: e.g., 'newest_first', 'oldest_first'

interfaces.name: addCommentToPost
interfaces.description: Add a new comment or reply to a blog post.

parameters.name: postId
parameters.description: ID of the BlogPost being commented on.

parameters.name: parentCommentId
parameters.description: Optional parent comment ID for threaded replies.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Comment text.

interfaces.name: submitContactMessage
interfaces.description: Submit a message through the Contact page, including bulk order requests.

parameters.name: topic
parameters.description: Reason for contact, e.g., 'bulk_orders', 'general_question', 'events', 'media', 'rights_permissions', 'technical_issue', 'other'.

interfaces.name: getContactTopics
interfaces.description: Get available contact topics/reasons to populate the topic dropdown on the Contact page.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page, including author biography, background, achievements, and notable books.

interfaces.name: getFaqEntries
interfaces.description: Get FAQ entries for the FAQ page, including questions and answers grouped by category.

interfaces.name: getPoliciesContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the Policies page, including privacy policy, data usage, and terms of use.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve the current cart from storage or create a new one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateActiveBundle
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve the current active eBook bundle or create one if not present.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateActiveCompareSet
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to retrieve the currently active compare set or create one if needed.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateDefaultLibraryList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to get or create a default library list for a given list_type, such as the main reading list or favorites.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateBundleTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recompute total price and item count for a bundle after changes.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recompute total price and item count for the cart after changes.
